recommendations.title: Havoc
recommendations.overview: When a drug heist swerves lethally out of control, a jaded cop fights his way through a corrupt city's criminal underworld to save a politician's son.

recommendations.title: Apostle
recommendations.overview: In 1905, a man travels to a remote island in search of his missing sister who has been kidnapped by a mysterious religious cult.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf McQuade

recommendations.title: Extraction
recommendations.overview: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son.

recommendations.title: Vikram Vedha
recommendations.overview: A notorious gangster Vedha surrenders himself to encounter specialist Vikram whom he challenges every step of the way by narrating his life events in the form of riddles that needs to be solved in order to capture him.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2

recommendations.title: Kiss of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Liu Jian, an elite Chinese police officer, comes to Paris to arrest a Chinese drug lord. When Jian is betrayed by a French officer and framed for murder, he must go into hiding and find new allies.
